contracts.note: The 7-day EWY put 11% out of the money saw heavy volume this hour, with today's prints already 500x the existing open interest, indicating new positions are being established. The $6.1M premium and 90% implied volatility suggest a strong conviction on a significant downside move in the very near term, with the above-mid tape showing buyers are willing to pay up.

The 0 DTE EWY $185 put saw heavy volume trade below the bid this hour, with today's prints already exceeding open interest by 17%. This indicates new positions are being established, and the 10% out-of-the-money strike with 1.42 implied volatility suggests a tactical bet on a significant move lower into expiration, despite the relatively small $100k premium.
